## Rig Type

Campervan, bus, ex-NBN van, ambulance, trailer, ute canopy, caravan, truck, mobile office, something worse.


## Department / Job Title

Examples: Registrar of Bad Decisions, Overnight Parking Appeals Officer, Mobile Fax Chaplain, Minister for Unacceptable Games.


## Backstory

Why are they living or working this way?


## The Rig Interior

What does it look, smell, sound, and feel like? Include office objects, tech, furniture, lighting, mess, rituals, and one embarrassing detail.


## Tools And Systems

What do they use? Hardware, software, ledger tricks, radio habits, repair skills, civic games, office supplies.


## What They Want
